summary: Iteration 57: Safe Wallet Movements Bug Fix - ALL 8 TESTS PASSED. The fix properly records wallet_movements for the safe wallet. Before the fix, safe operations modified safe_lots but never created wallet_movements entries, leaving the movement history empty. The new record_safe_movement() helper in utils/helpers.py is now called at all 7 locations where safe_lots are modified.

SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_01_cashier_to_safe_creates_movement: PASS - Fund transfer cashier→safe creates cash_in movement (+100.0)
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_02_safe_to_cashier_creates_movement: PASS - Fund transfer safe→cashier creates cash_out movement (-50.0)
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_03_capital_add_to_safe_creates_move: PASS - Capital injection to safe creates cash_in movement (+200.0)
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_04_po_payment_from_safe_creates_mov: PASS - PO payment from safe creates cash_out movement (-500.0)
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_05_po_adjust_payment_from_safe_crea: PASS - PO adjust-payment from safe creates cash_out movement (-100.0)
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_06_cashier_wallet_movements_regress: PASS - Cashier wallet movements still work correctly
SAFE_WALLET_MOVEMENTS_BUG_FIX.test_helper_exists_and_exported: PASS - record_safe_movement() helper exists and is exported from utils

code_locations_fixed.4_adjust_po_payment_deduction: /app/backend/routes/purchase_orders.py line 693 - Called after additional payment from safe
code_locations_fixed.5_adjust_po_payment_refund: /app/backend/routes/purchase_orders.py line 722 - Called after overpayment refund to safe
code_locations_fixed.6_cashier_to_safe: /app/backend/routes/accounting.py line 320 - Called after deposit to safe
code_locations_fixed.7_safe_to_cashier: /app/backend/routes/accounting.py line 342 - Called after withdrawal from safe
code_locations_fixed.8_safe_to_bank: /app/backend/routes/accounting.py line 365 - Called after bank deposit from safe
code_locations_fixed.9_capital_add_safe: /app/backend/routes/accounting.py line 397 - Called after capital injection to safe

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ record_safe_movement() correctly computes balance_after from safe_lots AFTER the operation
✓ Movement type uses 'cash_in' for positive amounts, 'cash_out' for negative amounts
✓ All 7 locations properly import and call record_safe_movement()
✓ Cashier wallet movements via update_cashier_wallet() unchanged and still working
Note: safe_to_bank requires TOTP authentication - code path verified but not live-tested
seed_data_creation: Created test POs and fund transfers to verify movement recording. All prefixed with TEST_ or FINAL_TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified the safe wallet movements bug fix. Key change: New record_safe_movement() helper in utils/helpers.py creates wallet_movements entries for the safe wallet. It's called at 7 locations: PO payment from safe, PO adjust-payment (both deduction and refund), fund transfers (cashier_to_safe, safe_to_cashier, safe_to_bank), and capital_add to safe. The Main Branch safe (ID: 6ccf740d-c26b-4a4e-8374-3631a45f4fcc) went from 0 movements to 12 movements after testing. GET /api/fund-wallets/{safe_id}/movements endpoint now returns proper history.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Safe wallet operations modified safe_lots collection but never created corresponding wallet_movements entries. The update_cashier_wallet() helper already created movements, but there was no equivalent for safe.
reproduction_steps: 3. Before fix: Returns empty list despite balance being deducted
4. After fix: Returns movement entry with type='cash_out' and correct amount
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Created record_safe_movement(branch_id, amount, reference) helper that inserts into wallet_movements collection. Applied it to all 7 code paths that modify safe_lots.
